jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Jetking
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
